meaning: n.一种纸牌游戏,<英俚>厕所,洗手间
examples: Can I use your loo, please?
Basically, it's you, your loo and your dressing gown.
The docked shuttle Endeavour provided a temporary loo as astronauts repaired the toilet.
Therapy and the support of friends and family helped Loo get through her depression.
Simple things like washing up or going to the loo have become major operations.
